title: LAXSS's Renewable Minecraft
description: A data pack that makes a large amount of non-renewable resources, renewable.
body:
![LAXSS's Renewable Minecraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98148e81af919587d4be75917797658cd65d6737.png)

# 102 Total Recipes*
(depending on what version you download)*

This data pack adds recipes to obtain unrenewable items in Minecraft, making them easily obtainable and no longer finite.

## Information About Recipes
**For certain recipes, a "structure void" item is required which is useless in survival and will be dropped by the warden.**

This mod does not currently contain renewable enchantments/enchantment books.

This mod does not contain recipes for creative mode only items (except bedrock), items unobtainable in peaceful mode and items that are unobtainable in Bedrock Edition.

This mod may come with some bugged recipes.

All items on [this list](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Non-renewable_resource?mobileaction=toggle_view_desktop) gained recipes, excluding the items mentioned above.

I would recommend using a mod/data pack that unlocks all recipes to view all the recipes in the data pack as currently there is no list of all recipes added.

This mod was made with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/).
